examples: She leaned forward to scrutinize their faces.
Her purpose was to scrutinize his features to see if he was an honest man.
As boards scrutinize succession plans in response to shareholder pressure, executives who don't get the nod also may wish to move on.
If we choose to scrutinize them, they need to have the right ingredients and provenance.
Most pensions have the resources to better scrutinize those they rely upon for advice.
